name: Sesame Chicken (Fhnd96b)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken thighs in half across the bone.
2. Marinate them in the soy sauce, Sherry, ginger, and enough cornstarch to make a thick sauce for 1 hour. Add the sesame seeds.
3. Deep fry pieces in peanut oil at 375°F until lightly browned. You can try substituting beef for the chicken.
